face.shape: soft oval face with balanced narrow proportions
face.jawline: soft tapered jawline with refined chin

eyes.shape: almond eyes with a calm level gaze
eyes.color: warm light brown to hazel brown

distinguishing_marks: small subtle beauty mark near the lower left side of the face close to the mouth area
very clean blunt bob line at the jaw

shot_plan.intent: Amy taking a mirror selfie with clean minimal styling, polished but believable iPhone UGC realism.

prompt_stack.character_lock: Actor lock: Amy, seed ugc_amy_seed_51704, soft oval face with balanced narrow proportions, soft refined tapered jawline, almond hazel-brown eyes with calm direct gaze, neutral warm ivory skin tone #E9D8CB with natural satin finish, light platinum blonde sleek blunt bob, chin-length, deep side part, subtle beauty mark near the lower left side of the face close to the mouth area, clean blunt bob edge at the jaw.
prompt_stack.scenario: Scenario: Amy is taking a mirror selfie indoors with a calm minimal expression, holding an iPhone naturally in front of her chest, relaxed posture, clean girl minimal energy, polished but not commercial, casual personal capture rather than editorial fashion image.
prompt_stack.environment: Environment: simple modern bathroom or bedroom mirror setup, neutral walls, soft daylight or mixed indoor light, faint realistic room details in the background, mirror surface with slight smudge or dust logic, clean but lived-in space.
prompt_stack.camera: Camera: simulated mirror selfie iPhone capture, phone visible in frame, portrait vertical composition, medium crop from chest up, slight perspective mismatch from reflection, mixed practical lighting, consumer HDR with mild hotspot clipping and realistic mirror-plane sharpness.
prompt_stack.realism_injection: Realism injection: visible skin pores and fine facial texture, a few stray hairs and fine crown flyaways, under-eye texture with soft natural depth, slightly uneven skin tone around eyes and nostrils, white high-neck fabric texture with knit detail and soft folds, environmental noise with faint grain and mirror texture, lighting imperfection from mixed room and window light, camera artifacts with subtle sharpening halos and smartphone processing, nail detail on the hand holding the phone, realistic object physics for phone angle, reflections, and posture.
prompt_stack.negative_prompt: beauty filter, porcelain skin, plastic CGI face, over-symmetry, fashion editorial polish, luxury campaign lighting, perfectly spotless mirror, floating phone, warped fingers, extra fingers, distorted reflection geometry, wrong eye color, wrong hair color, missing beauty mark, over-smoothed skin, fake bokeh, studio glamour styling.
